title: GS Paper I
subtitle: Indian Heritage and Culture, History and Geography of the World and Society

items.text: Sculptures of Harappan Civilisation & Town Planning
Sculptures of Mauryan Age, Pillars, and Rock-cut Caves
Buddhist and Jain Sculpture (Gandhara, Mathura, and Amravati schools)
Temple Architecture (Nagara, Dravida, Vesara styles, Odisha, Chola, Hoysala)
Indo-Islamic Architecture (Imperial Delhi Sultanate, Mughal, and Provincial)
Modern Architecture (European influence and Indo-Saracenic Architecture)
Tradition of Mural Paintings (Ajanta, Ellora, Bagh) and Miniature Paintings
Main Pillars of Indian Music, Classical Dance Forms, and Folk Dances
Indian Theatre (Classical Sanskrit, Regional) and Puppetry Traditions
Religions in India & Bhakti & Sufi Movements (Saints, Philosophy)
Sanskrit, Pali, Prakrit, and Sangam/Tamil Literature
Pre Historic Cultures (Palaeolithic, Mesolithic, Neolithic, Chalcolithic, Iron Age)
Indus Valley Civilization (Cities, Trade, Society, Religion, Decline)
Vedic Society (Texts, Upanishads, Polity, Social Organisation, Varna System)
Imperial Guptas & Harshavardhana (Administration, Art, Economy, Society)
Early Medieval Dynasties (Pratiharas, Palas, Rashtrakutas, Rajputs, Feudalism)
The Delhi Sultanate (1206-1526 AD) (Slave, Khalji, Tughlaq, Lodi Dynasties)
The Mughal Empire (Akbar's Administration, Deccan Policies, Aurangzeb's Reign)
Vijayanagar & Bahmani Kingdoms (Political, Social, and Cultural Life)
Advent of Europeans, British Conquest, and Consolidation (Plassey, Buxar)
The Revolt of 1857 (Causes, Leaders, Suppression, Consequences)
Early Nationalism (Pre-Congress Orgs, Indian National Congress formation)
Emergence of Gandhi and Mass Movements (NCM, Civil Disobedience, Quit India)
Partition of India (Wavell Plan, Cabinet Mission, Mountbatten Plan, Independence)
Indian Renaissance & Socio-Religious Reform Movements (Raja Ram Mohan Roy, etc.)
Re-organisation & Integration of States (Princely States, J&K, Hyderabad)
Linguistic Regionalism and Tribal/Caste Integration Policies
Overview of Economic Development (Five Year Plans, Land Reforms, S&T Policy)
Industrial Revolution, American Revolution, and French Revolution (Causes, Impacts)
Nationalism in Europe (Unification of Italy and Germany, Rise of Nation-States)
Colonialism and Imperialism in Asia & Africa (De-colonization phases)
World War I, World War II, Russian Revolution, and the Cold War
Political Philosophies (Capitalism, Socialism, Communism - Concepts, Relevance)

topics.name: Salient Features & Issues of Indian Society

items.text: Salient features of Indian Society & Diversity of India
Role of Women & Women's Organizations (Issues, Status, Empowerment)
Poverty and Developmental Issues (Causes, Schemes, Critical analysis)
Effects of Globalization on Indian Society (Social, Cultural, Economic)
Social Empowerment, Communalism, Secularism, and Regionalism
Origin of Earth, Interior of Earth (Crust, Mantle, Core, Seismic Waves)
Continental Drift Theory, Plate Tectonics, and Mountain/Volcano/Tsunami landforms
Geomorphic Processes (Weathering, Mass movements, Erosion & Deposition)
Composition & Structure of Atmosphere, Heat Balance, Pressure Belts, Winds
Air Masses, Fronts, Jet Streams, Tropical & Temperate Cyclones
Ocean Relief, Salinity, Temperature Distribution, Waves, Tides & Ocean Currents
Soil Characteristics & Vegetation Resources (Forests, Deforestation, Conservation)
Physiography of India (Himalayas, Peninsular Block, Indo-Ganga Plains)
Drainage Systems of India (Himalayan rivers: Indus, Ganga, Brahmaputra & Peninsular)
Indian Monsoon (Mechanisms, Jet Stream theory, El Nino & La Nina impacts)
Demography & Census (Population distribution, Literacy, Age-sex ratio, Migration)
Urbanization (Issues, Slums, Transport, Poverty, Smart Cities)
Distribution of Key Natural Resources (Minerals, Coal, Petroleum, Renewable Energy)
Factors influencing Location of Industries (Iron & Steel, Textile, Chemicals, IT)
